REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (6582-6586 Mission Street, Daly City, Ca 94014)
Off Calendar Dec-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Thomas Lucas (Trustee).

The sale was confirmed at $750,000.00 to Kid Lewng and Ken Yong Qiang subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed November 19, 2013. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $713,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Jones. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (147 Stillman Street, San Francisco, Ca 94107)
Off Calendar Dec-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Thomas Lucas.

At commencement of the hearing independent broker Niels Johnson indicated that he was purchasing the property with Ms. Tran. When advised by Mr. Siracusa that a Broker who is a purchaser is not entitiled to commissions, Mr. Johnson stated that he would no longer be purchasing the property. The sale was confirmed at $1,150,000.00 to Joyce Tran subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed November 19, 2013. The Court granted the Petition for Order Confirming Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,080,000.00 is required.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

Petition For Authority To List Ans Sell Real Property And To Enter Into Exclusive Listing Agreement With Real Estate Broker
Off Calendar Oct-03-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Thomas Lucas.

Mr. Shcultz stated that Mr. Sanchez passed away on the same day that the reverse mortgage was to be funded, that there is no opposition to sell the property, that there are a number of Heirs with fractional interest, and that there was significant litigation in the conservatorship and the trust. The Court granted the Petition for Authority to List and Sell Real Property, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Authority To Obtain Reverse Mortgage Secured By Trustors Residence; To Increase Trustees Bond And To Loan Funds To The Trust
Off Calendar Jun-03-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Patrick Sanchez. Avid Alavi for Thomas Lucas.

Mr. Der stated that his client wishes to remain in his own home for the rest of his life. The Petition for Authority to Obtain Reverse Mortgage, etc. was granted (subject to review of written order). Bond is increased to $594,000.00.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition Of Trustee For Authorization To Hire Gina Rangel To Provide Attendant Care For Settlor And His Wife
Off Calendar Aug-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Larry Siracusa for Thomas Lucas. Ernest Der Court appointed Counsel for Conservatee.

Mr. Siracusa stated that Juanita worked two days in May, that it was not the Conservator's intent to pay Gina for any day that Juanita worked, that the Conservatee's spouse died on Monday and that the same number of care hours were required due to the Conservatee's condition. In addition, Mr. Siracusa stated that Georgette's Counsel has not appeared, that the Former Trustee paid her Attorney $54,312.00 from the Trust, that Judge Dearman approved payment of $30,312.00 leaving a difference of $24,000.00, that the Court did not allow this issue to be addressed in the amendment to the Trust and that his Client has no position one way or another. Mr. Der stated that it was appropriate to pay Gina back to May excluding the days Juanita worked, that the issue of Georgette's Attorney's fees were fresh in his Client's mind and a sore spot for his Client, and that they need to put this issue to rest and deal with how it gets allocated in the future. The Court stated that it was concerned with the broad language in the order regarding Georgette's fees, that it was appropriate to reduce her share by the balance that was paid in excess for her Attorney and that it would allow it to be considered a receivable of the Estate against Georgette's portion without interest. The Court stated that it was inclined to approve the request to pay Gina but not back to May 1st. The Court granted accounting petition and the request for payment of Gina's fees (subject to review of the orders).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jan-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der, Court appointed Counsel for Patrick Sanchez. Avid Alavi for Thomas Lucas (Trustee). Susan Walters (Wife) was also present.

Mr. Der stated that a report filed found that Mr. Sanchez has capacity and that there was no conservatorship. In addition, Mr. Der represented to the Court that these were Mr. Sanchez' wishes, that he believed Mr. Sanchez has capacity to understand the requested changes to the Trust, what's in the trust, the rents, who his Children are, that he wanted to benefit all of his Children and that he also wanted to take care of his Wife. Furthermore, he stated that the settlement agreement allowed for amendment/modification to the trust, that Mr. Sanchez understands that someone may challenge the changes in the future and that the only issue had to do with Georgette's Attorney's fees with regard to the Conservatorship matter. Ms. Alavi stated that Thomas Lucas was not involved in the revision of the trust and that Mr. Sanchez wanted to care and provide for his Wife. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition And Declaration Of David B. Nemer, Jr., For Allowance Of Attorney'S Fees And Expenses
Off Calendar Jun-30-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Nemer in Propria Persona. Ernest Der for Patrick Sanchez.

The Court and Mr. Der addressed the concerns/objections raised by Mr. Sanchez. The Court found that the costs for services were reasonable, that the result was what Mr. Sanchez wanted and stated that it was having difficulty coming with a justification for reducing fees. The Court granted the petition, (signing the modified order for the same in open court). Fees were allowed in the amount of $34,487.50 of which $6,500.00 had already been paid.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

For Allowance Of Fees And Costs To Attorneys For Objector To Conservatorship And Reimbursement Of Retainer Fee Advanced For Proposed Conservatee'S Attorney
Off Calendar Jun-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for Mary Kucel (Petitioner).

Mr. Kato stated that the amount being sought was $23,170.25 for attorney's fees and costs, and $6,500.00 for reimbursement of the retainer fee. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: Ronald Quidachay. Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR#5220. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Handa.

For Allowance Of Fees And Costs To Attorneys For Objector To Conservatorship And Reimbursement Of Retainer Fee Advanced For Proposed Conservatee'S Attorney
Off Calendar May-27-2009 Continued To Jun-10-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Approval Of Atty'S Fees By Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-02-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Riffle for and with Georgette Aranda. Brent Kato for Mary Kucel. Ernest Der for and with Patrick Sanchez.

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions as to the appropriateness of fees being paid from the Trust without a Court order. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Carlito Mandia, CSR 689. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Jul-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Nemer for and with Patrick Sanchez. Jessica Harris and Charles Riffle for and with Georgette Aranda (Trustee).

Mr. Nemer stated that he needed the documents to evaluate the accounting in order to determine any additional objections. Mr. Riffle will provide the documents to Mr. Nemer. Mr. Nemer objected to the attorney's fees stating that Mr. Sanchez was not obligated to finance litigation brought by Georgette in prosecution of the conservatorship and that those fees must be approved by the court. In addition, he stated that there was no authority in the trust to pay Marlene Valenzuela and that Mr. Sanchez did not authorize payment. Mr. Riffle stated that the trust was not under court supervision. The Petition to Appoint Temporary Trustee was denied without prejudice until the trial on the conservatorship which is to be heard on September 29, 2008. Mr. Nemer's request for a report from Georgette in regard to the Power of Attorney was denied. The Court is approving the accounting. Mr. Riffle will submit an amended order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Anderson.

Petition To Compel Accounting By Trustee, For Appoint. Of Temporary Trustee, And To Compel Accountin
Off Calendar Jun-17-2008 Denied

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
